steps.title: Substitute x = 53 and evaluate
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 53$ into the equation $y = 0.67x + 2.6$:
$$y = 0.67(53) + 2.6$$
Calculate the product: $0.67 \times 53 = 35.51$

Add the constant: $y = 35.51 + 2.6 = 38.11$

The value closest to $38.11$ is $38$, which matches choice D — D is correct.
